trend_items.title: Repeat vendor tray quality defects
trend_items.recommended_action: Escalate to executive CAPA review and require vendor corrective action linkage.

trend_items.title: Sterile processing documentation gap
trend_items.recommended_action: Review owner action plan and verify evidence of containment.

trend_items.title: Inspection finding recurrence
trend_items.recommended_action: Continue monitoring trend and link inspection recurrence to CAPA closure evidence.

trend_items.title: Policy review completion delay
trend_items.recommended_action: Maintain routine monitoring and verify policy approval milestone.

executive_recommendations: Review executive_review CAPAs before routine CAPA governance discussion.
Prioritize CAPAs with worsening risk_score_delta and recurring findings.
Use overdue_delta and aging_risk_count as monthly executive dashboard signals.
Link recurring vendor-related CAPAs to Vendor Performance governance.

next_actions.action: Create CAPA Trend Intelligence frontend cards.
next_actions.rationale: Make CAPA risk movement and recurrence visible to executive users.

next_actions.action: Add CAPA trend metrics to Power BI export model.
next_actions.rationale: Enable monthly trend reporting and board-ready CAPA analytics.

next_actions.action: Connect CAPA trend intelligence to live CAPA records in a future milestone.
next_actions.rationale: Move from deterministic trend examples to database-backed operational intelligence.
